title: Timeline zoom on the Gantt views
what: Zoom controls on every Gantt timeline let you expand or condense how many days are visible — zoom in for a tight look at a busy week, zoom out to see the whole schedule.
where: Any Gantt timeline — an edit's Timeline tab, the project Gantt share link, or the Full Pipeline view. Controls sit at the top right of the chart.
how: Click + to zoom in (fewer days, more detail) or − to zoom out (more days visible).
Click Fit to snap back to the full schedule.
